description_long: This chaise features a compact, rectangular seat with a single, moderately high backrest that curves gently at one end, providing ergonomic support for lounging. The structure appears to be made primarily of light-colored wood, with a smooth, matte finish and minimal decorative elements. The seat is flat and unupholstered, suggesting a minimalist, utilitarian design suitable for outdoor or public urban spaces. The backrest is solid and continuous, rising from one side of the seat and curving slightly to offer comfort. There are no visible armrests, and the legs are short, block-like extensions of the main frame, giving the chaise a sturdy, grounded appearance. The overall design is simple and functional, with clean lines and a focus on durability.
description: A minimalist wooden chaise with a single curved backrest and a flat, unupholstered seat, designed for urban outdoor use. The structure is sturdy, with short, block-like legs and a smooth, matte finish.
description_view_0: From this top-down angle, the rectangular seat and the single curved backrest on one side are visible, highlighting the chaise's compact footprint.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the height and gentle curve of the backrest, as well as the solid, block-like construction of the legs.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the continuous, unbroken backrest and the flat seat, with no armrests or additional features visible.
description_view_3: This opposite side view mirrors view 1, again showing the backrest's curve and the chaise's sturdy, minimalist frame.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is a single, solid piece that rises moderately high from one end of the seat and curves gently, providing ergonomic support. It is unsegmented, with a smooth, continuous surface and no decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, block-like extensions of the main frame, constructed from the same wood as the rest of the chaise, with no visible decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: There is no visible upholstery; the seat and backrest are made of smooth, unadorned wood with a matte finish.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: No cushions are present; the seat and backrest are both solid and unupholstered, with a minimalist, functional arrangement.
